items.title: WATCH:  Smoke blankets Mexico's Puerto Vallarta after death of cartel leader
items.description: Widespread violence erupted after a cartel boss was killed in a military raid.

items.title: Blizzard live updates: Monster storm dropping 3 inches of snow per hour
items.description: A massive winter storm is ripping across the Northeast, dumping more than 1 foot of snow.

items.title: BBC apologizes after racial slur shouted during BAFTA awards by guest with Tourette's
items.description: BAFTA and the BBC have apologized after a person with Tourette syndrome shouted a racial slur during the British Academy Film Awards

items.title: 25 Mexican National Guard troops left dead in operation that killed cartel leader
items.description: Mexico Security Secretary Omar García Harfuch says 25 members of the National Guard were left dead in Jalisco in six separate attacks after the killin...

items.title: WATCH:  Controversy erupts at BAFTA awards
items.description: The BBC is apologizing to BAFTA viewers after several obscene outbursts from Tourette’s activist John Davidson were heard on the broadcast.
